case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. DEBRA ALLEN et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-25-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, DEBRA $2,244.66 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $884.95 INTEREST, $259.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,874.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
